overview.summary: Model score 7 vs user score 10 (gap -3). Primary drivers: Environmental Noise / Speech, Motion / Restlessness, Location Stability. Agreement classification: USER_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Short observation window likely caused the model to smooth over transient distractions that the user perceived strongly.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio trend captured noise profile correctly, but distraction weighting should increase when speech overlaps sustained ambient noise.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals alignment was acceptable, but confidence should be capped when biometric coverage is sparse.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion settling was detected correctly; avoid over-crediting stillness when other distraction signals are strong.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS is useful for confirming location stability; keep it as secondary context signal.

judgment_policy_next_run: Apply stronger session-specific context weighting over historical baseline anchoring.
Use uncertainty-aware scoring for short sessions with incomplete multimodal coverage.
